content.en:
"The Ancient Domain of the Stars is a prison!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He had expected that there would be a powerful existence in the Holy Land, or some shocking eternal source, but he didn't expect it to be the case.

The Ancient Realm of the Stars is a prison, and the so-called Holy Land is the core of the prison.

At this moment, many Ancient Star Clan geniuses panicked one by one.

At this time, Donghe said: "You don't need to worry, although our Star Ancient Domain is a prison, there is no possibility that there will be any problems, and this prison is imprisoned and sealed by the ancestors of our Ancient Star Clan, our Ancient Star Clan is a race derived from the ancestral breath, if there is no ancestor, we will not be able to develop to the current scale." Our ultimate goal is to free this ancestor, which of course is very difficult. But if we don't release this ancestor, we will be trapped in the prison of the Star Ancient Domain forever, and we will never be able to leave here. "

Hearing this, Ye Tian finally understood why the Ancient Star Clan couldn't leave the Star Ancient Domain.

This Star Ancient Domain is a prison, and the Ancient Star Clan is the descendant of the prisoner, so naturally there is no way to leave, and it will be blocked by the Star Ancient Domain.

It's a prison, it's a forbidden place, but it's still a chance.

And the powerful being that was sealed was where the opportunity came in.

What a mysterious place the Star Ancient Domain is, even the Void Origin Ancestor has not entered the Star Ancient Domain, but such a place is a prison, it can be seen that the strength of the imprisoned existence must be very strong, definitely not weaker than the Void Source Ancestor, and even stronger than the Void Source Ancestor.

Soon, Donghe took the geniuses of the Ancient Star Clan to a mysterious space in the Holy Land.

This mysterious space is a mysterious space created by the ancestors of the ancient star clan who spent a long time finally throwing some power, and in this mysterious space there is a treasure left by that mysterious existence - the ancient star stone.

Under the influence of the ancient star stone, this space has been transformed into a treasure land.

The genius of the Ancient Star Clan can absorb the power of the Ancient Star Stone through the talent of the Ancient Star Body, making the body and soul stronger, even if it has a certain effect on the first-class invincible, but there is a limit to the power that every Ancient Star Clan member can absorb.

"The Ancient Star Stone is the Eternal Source Thing, and the compatibility between the Ancient Star Clan and the Ancient Star Stone of the Eternal Source is 100%!"

Ye Tian completely understood at this moment.

Strictly speaking, the Ancient Star Stone is the true eternal source of the Ancient Star Clan.

Absorbing the ancient star stone to strengthen the body and soul is a small opportunity, not a real big opportunity, the real big opportunity is an ancient star tower in the ancient star stone space, and a wisp of consciousness of the ancestor of the ancient star clan is hidden in this ancient star tower.

If you can get his approval, you can get his guidance and a part of the lineage.

And the ultimate goal of the Ancient Star Clan is to cultivate a supreme person who can save the ancestors, but it has not been cultivated so far.

At this moment, Ye Tian was thinking about one thing, that is, would he change it to attract the attention of the imprisoned ancestor of the Ancient Star Clan?

If he doesn't attract the attention of the other party, he is afraid that he will not be able to get any benefits, although the opportunity of Gu Xingshi is also good, but he is copying the body, and he can't bring benefits to the body!

After thinking about it, Ye Tian still decided to attract the attention of that ancestor of the Ancient Star Clan.

Near the Ancient Star Stone.

Ye Tian urged the Ancient Star Eternal Ancestor Fu and began to absorb the origin power from the Ancient Star Stone.

Bang!!!!

A large amount of Ancient Star Stone Origin Power poured into Ye Tian's body, and was absorbed and refined by him, forming an Origin Vortex.

This is something that has never happened since the opening of the Ancient Star Stone space, and it has attracted the attention of many Ancient Star Clan people for a while.

As time passed, the strength of Ye Tian's copied body became stronger and stronger, and his body and soul were soaring wildly.

"What's going on?"

Many invincible people were confused, how could any invincible person be able to absorb the origin power of the ancient star stone so quickly, this was too abnormal, right?

Soon, the supreme being of the outside world, Donghe, also learned about the situation in the ancient star stone space.

As a result, Gu Xingshi immediately summoned several other Ten Supreme Beings.

"Donghe, could it be that something happened to the Holy Land?"

"Donghe, what are you asking me to do, I'm still cultivating?"

"Donghe, is there an outsider who has broken into the holy land?"

A Supreme Man asked.

"You'll know when you dig your consciousness into the Ancient Star Stone Space!" Donghe said.

Whoa!!

The consciousness of a supreme person probed into the ancient star stone space and sensed Ye Tian's situation, and they were also stunned.

"The speed at which this ancient star stone is absorbed is many times faster than when we were at the beginning!"

Gu Shen was shocked.

"Could it be ......" Chi Yang, another Supreme Being, had some guesses, and said, "Could it be that his ancient astral body talent is above all of us?"

Gu Shen said: "Many of us in the Ancient Star Clan have the talent of the Ancient Star Body, and the best of them have the Ultimate Ancestral Body-level Ancient Star Body, but this fourth-class invincible clansman, his Ancient Star Talent is afraid to surpass the Ultimate Ancestral Body. “

The other Supreme Beings looked shocked, and a talent level came to their minds—Eternal Ancestral Fu!

The Ancient Star Clan has never given birth to an Eternal Ancestor-level Ancient Star Body, this is the first time!

It is conceivable that this is such an important thing for the Ancient Star Clan.

"Maybe you can train this person well, and hopefully help your ancestors get out of trouble!" Donghe muttered.

......

Ancient Star Stone Space.

Ye Tian continued to absorb the origin power of the Ancient Star Stone, and he knew that he had already attracted the attention of those supreme beings, and he was even afraid that he had attracted the attention of the ancestors of the Ancient Star Clan.

However, he did not panic at all.

After all, he was now a real Gu Star Clan from body to soul, and no one could find out his identity.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian absorbed more and more of the origin power of the Ancient Star Stone, even if he couldn't take it away, he wouldn't waste this absorption, otherwise it would arouse the suspicion of the other Ancient Star Clans, so he would absorb it to his limit.

Finally, one day, Ye Tian felt the limit of his body, if he absorbed it to the limit, it would affect his future impact on the Supreme Realm, so he stopped absorbing.

At this time, the strength of his replica body has also improved a lot.

"It's time to go to the Ancient Star Tower!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Wow!

Ye Tian flew towards the Ancient Star Tower, secretly took a deep breath, and then stepped into the Ancient Star Tower.

What exactly was inside the Ancient Star Tower, Ye Tian didn't know, and the other Ancient Star Clan people who came out of the Ancient Star Tower wouldn't reveal much.

He only knew that entering the Ancient Star Tower would go through some assessments, but Ye Tian found that he had not gone through the assessments.

Rumble!!!!

A powerful consciousness came to Ye Tian's face, somewhat similar to Jin Zu's original consciousness, but this consciousness in front of him was many times more terrifying than Jin Zu.

When he saw this consciousness, Ye Tian realized who this consciousness was in front of him.

He must be the ancestor of the Ancient Star Clan, that mysterious and powerful existence, a mysterious powerhouse who needs the entire Star Ancient Domain to be turned into a prison to suppress.
